events.title: All Fcpl Branches and Offices Will Be Closed Monday, May 25 for Memorial Day
events.summary: Regular hours will resume Tuesday, May 26. FCPL is always available online! Search our digital offerings via Libby or explore other ways to enjoy your local library from home by visiting our website.
events.short_note: Free indoor family-friendly event at ALL.

events.title: Canclled: English Conversation Group
events.short_note: Free indoor family-friendly event at Oakton Library, Oakton Conference Room.

events.title: Cancelled: English Conversation at Oakton Online
events.summary: Practice speaking English with an English teacher and other students online. Registration is required and a Zoom invitation will be emailed to students one day before the virtual event. You will need...
events.short_note: Free online/virtual family-friendly event at Virtual Event.

events.title: Cancelled: Organ Donor Information Session
events.summary: Have you considered registering as an organ donor, but wish you knew more? Infinite Legacy is the nonprofit organization dedicated to saving and healing lives through organ, eye, and tissue donation...
events.short_note: Free indoor family-friendly event at Sherwood Regional Library.

events.title: Cancelled English Conversation Class
events.summary: Cancelled Practice speaking English with a library volunteer and other students in a relaxed atmosphere. This is an in-person class. For adults. No registration required.
events.short_note: Indoor workshop at Sherwood Regional Library.

events.title: Cancelled: English Conversation Group
events.short_note: Free indoor family-friendly event at Oakton Library, Oakton Conference Room.

events.title: 55+ "tour De Friends" Bike Club
events.summary: Stay active with friendly biking companions. We’ll explore nearby trails and neighborhoods in a fun, safe manner. Ride distances are between 10-25 miles; durations vary. All levels of ability welcomed! No riders left behind. Destinations may be changed or excursions canceled for inclement weather.

events.title: Hike to the Potomac (nsnp)
events.summary: Hike to see where Gulf Branch stream joins the Potomac River - check out our scenic waterfall, take some great photos, and enjoy the spring weather!
events.short_note: Free hike.

events.title: Intergenerational Rock Painting
events.summary: Participants of all ages are invited to paint rocks for the new Lubber Run Rock Garden. Whether adding a positive message, a fun pattern, or a vibrant splash of color, each rock will contribute to a shared community space. No artistic experience needed—just imagination! Supplies will be provided. Open to all ages: no 55+ Pass required.
events.short_note: Outdoor arts program for all ages.

events.title: Med Not Meds
events.summary: This presentation introduces the principles of the Mediterranean diet, focusing on heart-healthy foods such as fruits, vegetables, whole grains and healthy fats. Virginia Cooperative Extension master food volunteers will teach participants how to make simple, flavorful choices that support long-term health and wellness.
events.short_note: Free cooking class.

events.title: Pre-k: Water
events.summary: Ages 3 to 5 years. Preschool programs are offered throughout the year at both Gulf Branch and Long Branch Nature Centers. The theme for preschool programs is repeated during the month, so please register for only one session at each nature center per month. Caretakers must stay with their child during the program.
events.short_note: Cost: $7 outdoor nature program.

events.title: Reader's Theater - Radio Plays
events.summary: Join 55+ Center Director Jennifer Weber for a casual and fun reading of vintage radio plays. In this casual environment there is no need for sets, costumes, or memorized lines. Everybody gets a part! Music by 55+ volunteer and musician Ken Schellenberg.
events.short_note: Free indoor music program.

events.title: Stream Explorationn (nsnp)
events.summary: NSNP! Bring the whole family to play in Gulf Branch stream! We'll learn about local plants and animals on our hike down to the water and we'll explore under the rocks of the stream for macroinvertebrates. Must wear closed toe shoes in the water and bring clothes that can get wet! Ages 6 to 10.
events.short_note: Free hike for all ages.

events.title: Tiny Tot: Butterflies
events.summary: Ages 18 to 35 months with adult. Tiny Tot programs provide opportunities to interact one-on-one with your child while discovering the wonders of nature. Each program will engage your child with hands-on learning and may include a variety of activities like songs, games, crafts, and mini-hikes. Tiny Tot programs are offered throughout the year at Gulf and Long Branch Nature Centers. Each program h
events.pricing_summary: Cost: $7 Ages 18 to 35 months with adult
events.short_note: Cost: $7 craft activity for toddlers.
